rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-2285; improvement to always report 'wallTime' in change stream output, child of cross-driver coordination ticket.
Go-specific BSON unmarshaling bug with type aliases; internal behavior not governed by a specific BSON spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2309; banning comparisons to encrypted fields in validator/partialFilterExpression, child of cross-driver coordination.
Go-specific panic in BSON UnmarshalBSON with pointer/non-pointer mismatch; implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Intermittent connection disconnect during listCollections/collStats; network reliability issue, no spec rule violation.
API ergonomics request to add typed unmarshaling to Distinct(); not a spec requirement deviation, just missing convenience API.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1975; improved change stream event visibility for C2C replication, child of cross-driver coordination.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2360; fixing CSE prose test 13 to account for no matching documents, test infrastructure update.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2359; requiring 4.2.0 server for tests with 'csfle: true' runOnRequirement, test infrastructure fix.
Internal performance optimization for CompressorNoOp; no spec behavior changed, pure implementation efficiency improvement.
Excess memory consumption from zstd compression; performance/memory issue with no specific spec rule violated.
CI script update to run tests in all directories; build/CI infrastructure, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Documentation improvement noting Session/SessionContext are not goroutine-safe; doc update, no spec behavior violated.
Dependency security update for golang.org/x/crypto; packaging/security vulnerability fix, no spec involvement.
Memory allocation optimization in NewInsufficientBytesError; internal performance fix, no spec rule violated.
Windows CI setup failure in activate_venv.sh; CI/build infrastructure bug, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
RTT monitor 'hello' operations lack timeout, could hang indefinitely; implementation gap, no specific SDAM spec rule mandating timeout.
Failing RTT90 tests on Windows due to closed connections; CI/platform-specific test failure, no spec behavior involved.
Undeprecating legacy timeout options to avoid premature API breakage; API ergonomics decision, no spec violation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2355; testing with consistent versions of crypt_shared and server, CI/test infrastructure update.
CI improvement to run Windows task on every PR; build/CI infrastructure improvement, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2408; error if RewrapManyDataKey called with old libmongocrypt version, child of cross-driver coordination.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2386; improving reliability of SDAM heartbeat error spec tests, test infrastructure update.
Internal refactor to centralize maxTimeMS calculation; code organization improvement, no spec behavior changed.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2377; GCP attached service accounts for GCP KMS, child of cross-driver coordination ticket.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2382; updating CSE unified tests expectResult: null, test infrastructure update.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2395; adding test that reads are not retried in a transaction, spec test infrastructure addition.
Updating Go version used in Evergreen CI to 1.18; CI/build infrastructure update, no spec involvement.
WithTransaction returns confusing error when context canceled during error handling; API behavior improvement, no specific transactions spec rule violated.
Pre-write context expiration incorrectly classified as network timeout; internal error classification bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2344; exposing rich field info in updateDescription, child of cross-driver coordination ticket.
Memory allocation inefficiency in createMsgWireMessage(); internal performance optimization, no spec behavior involved.
Buffer pooling to reduce memory allocation in Operation.Execute; internal performance optimization, no spec behavior involved.
Heavy memory allocations in selectByKind; internal performance issue, no spec rule violated.
WaitQueueTimeoutError returned for context cancellation instead of timeout; API ergonomics improvement, no specific CMAP spec rule mandates this distinction.
Moving main.go binary build targets into cmd/ directory; internal code organization refactor, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2327; spec requires propagating original error for NoWritesPerformed label; driver failed to do so.
CPU performance issue from replaceErrors missing nil check in ChangeStream; internal optimization, no spec rule violated.
ObjectID.Hex() allocation optimization using array instead of slice; internal performance improvement, no spec involvement.
Modifying retry logic per CSOT spec; explicitly references CSOT spec retryability rules that required implementation changes.
Data race in NumberSessionsInProgress() when called from multiple goroutines; concurrency bug, no spec rule specifies thread safety requirements.
serverSelectionTimeoutMS default of 30s documented and spec-required but was inadvertently removed in GODRIVER-1530.
Adding paralleltest linter to detect incorrect parallel test usage; CI/tooling improvement, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2018; adding language-specific examples for AWS Lambda; documentation/examples, no spec behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2412; SDAM spec requires prioritizing electionId over setVersion only on >=6.0 servers; driver did not implement this correctly.
executeOperation ignores error from createPipelineOptionsDoc causing broken BSON; internal error handling bug, no specific change stream spec rule violated.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2023; adding troubleshooting FAQ section; documentation, no spec behavior involved.
cursor.All Close called with expired context instead of Background; implementation improvement, no specific cursor spec rule mandates this behavior.
Extending IsTimeout to return true for additional error types; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule specifies which errors are timeouts.
SRV hostname parsing failed for URIs with username/password, extracting user instead of host; violates SRV/DNS seedlist URI parsing spec.
